privileged_info_summary: The survey_boundary_overlay task uses real architectural data from the Apache-licensed jscad/sample-files GitHub repository. The source file (floorplan.dxf) is a genuine 2004-format AutoCAD drawing of a 2-car garage with attached residential house, containing exactly 967 entities across 24 layers and measuring 1.1 MB in file size. The baseline entity count metadata value of 967 is verified correct. The task requires agents to overlay survey elements (property boundaries with bearing notation, setback lines, easements, and north arrow) on this real architectural drawing, saving output to floorplan_survey.dxf with minimum thresholds of 4 boundary entities and 2 bearing text annotations.
